narrative_beat: Mesa gotica longa com cadeiras vazias — uma cadeira ao fundo iluminada por feixe dourado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a long gothic council table flanked by two rows of empty high-backed wooden chairs receding into shadow
subject.focal_point: one distant chair at the end of the table illuminated by a vertical golden shaft of light
subject.secondary: Floating ash particles drift through the space. The nearest chairs in warm tones fade to monochrome in the distance.
props: seventeen high-backed chairs on each side

environment.location: cavernous congressional salon with vaulted ceiling

composition.foreground: table surface and near chairs in warm amber tones

lighting.key_light: vertical golden beam from above hitting distant chair
lighting.fill_light: faint amber ambience from unseen source

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: thirty-four witnesses as a consecrated council
symbolism.secondary: one illuminated chair as singular testimony

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
